violation: 2020 PMCNYS - Section 107.1.3 - Structure Unfit for Human Occupancy
article:
A structure is unfit for human occupancy whenever such structure is unsafe, unlawful or, because of the degree to which the structure is in disrepair or lacks maintenance, is unsanitary, vermin or rat infested, contains filth and contamination, or lacks ventilation, illumination, sanitary or heating facilities or other essential equipment required by this code, or because the location of the structure consti
tutes a hazard to the occupants of the structure or to the public.

A structure is unfit for human occupancy whenever such structure is unsafe, unlawful or, because of the degree to which the structure is in disrepair or lacks maintenance, is unsanitary, vermin or rat infested, contains filth and contamination, or lacks ventilation, illumination, sanitary or heating facilities or other essential equipment required by this code, or because the location of the structure consti
tutes a hazard to the occupants of the structure or to the public.
corrective_action: Due to the lack of fire safety codes, the 3rd floor apartment will remain unfit until all permits are obtained and all safety requirements are met, or the space is reduced back to its original state at the time of construction.

violation: SPCC - Section 27-115 (a) Designation and vacation of unfit premises
article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.

violation: SPCC - Section 27-115 (a) Designation and vacation of unfit premises
article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.

A structure is unfit for human occupancy whenever such structure is unsafe, unlawful or, because of the degree to which the structure is in disrepair or lacks maintenance, is unsanitary, vermin or rat infested, contains filth and contamination, or lacks ventilation, illumination, sanitary or heating facilities or other essential equipment required by this code, or because the location of the structure consti
tutes a hazard to the occupants of the structure or to the public.
corrective_action: Apply for and obtain a Certificate of Use, or the business will be subject to immediate closure by the Division of Code Enforcement.
plain_english_summary: Apply for and obtain a Certificate of Use, or the business will be subject to immediate closure by the Division of Code Enforcement.

violation: SPCC - Section 27-115 (a) Designation and vacation of unfit premises
article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.
corrective_action: Cease all operations of the commercial tenancy and completely vacate (without reentry) at the Premises, until such time as the Director determines that the Premises is not an imminent danger to the health, safety or welfare of the public through the sale of unlawful synthetic drugs, and a Letter of Approval of Re-occupancy is issued by the Division.
plain_english_summary: Cease all operations of the commercial tenancy and completely vacate (without reentry) at the Premises, until such time as the Director determines that the Premises is not an imminent danger to the health, safety or welfare of the public through the sale of unlawful synthetic drugs, and a Letter of Approval of Re-occupancy is issued by the Division.

corrective_action: The premises hasn't had an issued Certificate of Use "C of U" since 9/14/20, which expired on 9/14/22.  Inspections from the Syracuse Fire Department and the Division of Code Enforcement are a requirement to obtain a C of U.  The inspections are necessary to ensure that there are no hazards to the public, and so all health and safety requirements are installed and functioning correctly.  Operating without safety inspections constitutes hazards to the public and to occupants on the premises.  Vacate the premises immediately.  Safety inspections of the entire premises will be required before re-occupancy.
plain_english_summary: The premises hasn't had an issued Certificate of Use "C of U" since 9/14/20, which expired on 9/14/22.  Inspections from the Syracuse Fire Department and the Division of Code Enforcement are a requirement to obtain a C of U.  The inspections are necessary to ensure that there are no hazards to the public, and so all health and safety requirements are installed and functioning correctly.  Operating without safety inspections constitutes hazards to the public and to occupants on the premises.  Vacate the premises immediately.  Safety inspections of the entire premises will be required before re-occupancy.

article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.

violation: SPCC - Section 27-115 (a) Designation and vacation of unfit premises
article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.
corrective_action:
The hole in the roof has omitted water for several years, causing water damage to the interior.  This most likely has caused significant damage and most likely leaked into the electrical causing hazards.  The roof needs to be repaired, the electrical needs to be inspected by a licensed electrician and the interior damage needs to be repaired.
    There is no running water at the property and it must be restored.  The front porch is near collapse and must be repaired or demolished immediately.  This is causing hazards to the residents and public.

The hole in the roof has omitted water for several years, causing water damage to the interior. corrective_action:
Repair all life and safety fixtures that include the fire alarm system, emergency lights, exit signs, smoke detectors and carbon monoxide detectors.  

Clean all of the trash & debris, needles and filth throughout the entire premises.  Also, exterminate for all insects and rodents. 

Properly secure all entrance doors and windows at each building.  Fires have been started in multiple buildings, ovens have been left on in multiple vacant apartments, gas lines and electrical have been continually damaged,  The unsecure buildings have also encouraged crime, property damage, violence, drug sales and drug use.  It is recommended to hire on site security.

violation: SPCC - Section 27-115 (a) Designation and vacation of unfit premises
article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.

violation: SPCC - Section 27-115 (a) Designation and vacation of unfit premises
article:
(a) Unfit premises shall be any premises within the scope of this code, having any of the following defined defects and may be designated by the director as unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health and may be so placarded:
(1)The structure lacks illumination, ventilation, sanitation, heat or other facilities adequate to protect the health and safety of the occupants or the public.(2) The structure or premises is damaged, decayed, dilapidated, unsanitary, unsafe or vermin infested in such a manner as to create a serious hazard to the health and safety of the occupants or the public. is so unsanitary, unsafe, overcrowded or otherwise detrimental to health and safety that it creates a serious hazard to the occupants or the public. (4) The structure, because of the failure of the owner or occupant to comply with such notice and orders, issued pursuant to this code, is unfit for human habitation or dangerous to human life or detrimental to health.
